expectations.text: Uses flutter_animate (.animate() with .fadeIn() or .moveY() or similar) for entry animations
Checks MediaQuery.of(context).disableAnimations (respects accessibility reduced motion setting)
Multiple elements use staggered animation delays for sequential reveals
References AppTextStyles.* (no inline TextStyle with raw font sizes)
